title: ChatGPT 双项更新：工作区智能体上线，临床辅助功能深度优化
digest: [fallback] Generate one Chinese digest sentence (<=120 chars) for WeChat article summary. 素材：OpenAI 正式向美国认证的医师、护士及药剂师免费开
intro:
📅 **2026.04.22 | AI 每日观察**

当大模型从“问答助手”进化为“工作伙伴”，边界正在消融。今日 OpenAI 双管齐下：既深耕垂直领域，让 ChatGPT 更契合临床诊疗需求；又正式引入 Workspace Agents，推动智能体真正嵌入工作流。是生产力跃迁，还是交互范式的重构？今日早报，带你拆解关键信号。🚀
closing: 感谢您的阅读。愿今日的内容能为您提供些许助益。AI 技术日新月异，我们将持续为您梳理前沿动态，保持客观与审慎。明日更新已准备就绪，欢迎点击上方「关注」，与我们一同见证技术的演进。

模型发布.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
模型发布.summary: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
模型发布.content: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.
模型发布.ai_summary: OpenAI 正式向美国认证的医师、护士及药剂师免费开放“面向临床医生的 ChatGPT”服务。此举旨在利用 AI 技术辅助临床护理、病历文档及科研，以降低医疗负担并提升诊疗效率。

模型发布.title: Workspace agents
模型发布.summary: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
模型发布.content: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.
模型发布.ai_summary: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 Workspace Agents，支持用户构建和扩展智能体以自动化重复性工作流。此举通过连接工具并优化团队协作流程，将显著提升企业级的运营效率与生产力。

模型发布.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
模型发布.summary: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
模型发布.content: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.
模型发布.ai_summary: OpenAI 正式推出 ChatGPT Workspace Agents，这是一种基于 Codex 驱动的云端智能体，可自动化处理复杂工作流。该功能旨在帮助团队在多种工具间安全、高效地扩展工作规模，提升协作效率。这标志着 AI 代理正从个人任务向团队协同自动化演进。
